title: Kenyan Bulgur Pilaf
description: A flavorful and nutritious Kenyan-inspired bulgur pilaf, perfect for a weeknight meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped spring onions and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the Kenyan spices and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the bulgur and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the spring water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the water is absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and season with salt to taste.
